name: @robhowley/pi-session-deck-desktop
description: Tauri desktop companion for Session Deck using installed desktop runtime metadata.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md package.json tsconfig.json web/ scripts/ __tests__/ src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/capabilities/default.json && node ./scripts/run-cargo.js fmt --check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.format:write: prettier --write README.md package.json tsconfig.json web/ scripts/ __tests__/ src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/capabilities/default.json && node ./scripts/run-cargo.js fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
